subcodes.first_line: O 'Alí-Qabli-Akbar! Hearken thou unto the Voice of thy Lord, the Lord of Power, from the Most Great Horizon. Verily, there is no Beloved but Me [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان یا علی قبل اکبر ان استمع ندآء ربک مالک القدر من المنظر الاکبر انه لا محبوب سوآئی
subcodes.subjects: @eulogies; reminiscences, @martyrs and martyrdom, @transcendence; unknowability of God, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @praise and encouragement
